commit_scope: fourth-kernel.form m4b first walker: the fourth kernel's walker authored entirely as recipes over the minimal surface — programs are content-addressed cells, dispatch-on-tag down the observe door, op set LIT/ARG/ADD/SUB/LE/IF/SELF, fib authored as data answers through SELF re-entering the program. Proven three-way at verdict 15.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-walker-band.fk
local_validation.summary: The walker holds three-way at 15: (1) arithmetic walks — ADD(LIT 40, LIT 2) = 42 and SUB(LIT 50, LIT 8) = 42; (2) both branch arms walk — IF(LE(ARG,1),111,222) answers 111 at the just-at-threshold arg 1 and 222 at arg 2; (4) recursion walks — fib authored as data answers 55 at arg 10 and 1 at the base-case boundary, SELF re-entering the whole program; (8) programs are cells — the fib program authored twice is the SAME cell, one changed leaf is a DIFFERENT cell. The walker touches only the surface doors plus figure leaves (add/sub/le — the compute organ's port).

observed_delta.op_set: LIT ARG ADD SUB LE IF SELF

known_limitations.limitation: One-argument programs with whole-program SELF recursion; no environments, closures, or multi-arity yet — the smallest heart that proves recursion over content-addressed programs.
known_limitations.follow_up: The op set grows toward the full category table as m4c's emitter learns to lower it; environments arrive when a workload earns them.

known_limitations.limitation: Meta-interpretation cost (this walker runs on a kernel walker) is unmeasured by design — m4b is correct-before-fast; the rows come when m4c emits this walker native.
known_limitations.follow_up: m4c: the emitter lowers fk-walk itself; the audit harness then adds the emitted-walker row.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run the three-way band.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib additions ride the api image rebuild; the lattice ingests the updated fourth-kernel.form on the post-merge hook.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route behavior changes. The body gains the m4b walker: recipes-as-cells walked to values by a walker that is itself recipes over the m4a surface — the precondition for m4c (the emitter lowers the walker to native source).
test_flows: fourth-walker-band proves arithmetic, both branch arms, SELF recursion (fib-as-data = 55 and the base-case boundary), and program-as-cell identity (same program twice = same cell, changed leaf = different cell), three-way at verdict 15.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh end-to-end across Go/Rust/TS: 1 ok, 0 divergent, verdict 15.

phase_gate.gate: the first walker proven three-way locally; CI three-way + deploy ingest confirm the crossing
phase_gate.next: m4c — the emitter walks fk-walk's recipe shape and emits its native source; toolchain port compiles; the binary joins the audit rows
